name: The Overloaded IC
jobsToBeDone: Surface relevant context automatically when starting a task
Share mental models without a synchronous call
Find the canonical version of a decision from 6 months ago

thinkingStyle.cognitiveSpace: Maintains a mental map of 'who knows what' across the org; anxious when that map feels stale or incomplete. Optimizes for reducing cognitive overhead.
emotionalReactions: Frustrated when searches return irrelevant noise
Relieved when context surfaces unprompted before a meeting
Skeptical of 'AI summaries' that omit nuance
guidingPrinciples: I'd rather ask a question than make a wrong assumption
Speed of retrieval matters more than perfect organization
